articles.title: Fugitive Dezi Freeman shot dead by Australian police after seven months in hiding
articles.summary: Freeman has been wanted since the fatal shooting of two police officers in Porepunkah in August.

articles.title: Myanmar junta chief Min Aung Hlaing nominated as president
articles.summary: The military leader, who has been sanctioned by Western countries, is now certain to get the job.

articles.title: Latin Patriarch will have access to Jerusalem holy site after police stopped entry
articles.summary: The Israeli PM said Cardinal Pierbattista Pizzaballa had been asked not to enter the church out of concern for his safety.

articles.title: Partial government shutdown becomes the longest in US history
articles.summary: The 44-day funding lapse for the Department of Homeland Security has led to travel chaos at US airports.

articles.summary: The paintings were taken from a museum in Parma by four masked men in the middle of the night, police say.

articles.title: Three killed as unfinished building collapses on church service in Ghana

articles.title: Fuel tax halved and free public transport offered as war pushes up prices in Australia
articles.summary: Victoria and Tasmania are incentivising commuters not to drive in a bid to ease cost pressures.

articles.title: No Kings protests draw large crowds to rally against Donald Trump
articles.summary: One of the flagship No Kings rallies happened in Minnesota, where singer Bruce Springsteen performed to crowds.
